name: Tableau
tagline: Business intelligence and data visualisation platform
description: Tableau is a leading BI and data visualisation platform by Salesforce. It enables business users and analysts to connect to data sources, build interactive dashboards, and share insights — without needing to write SQL.
cons: Desktop app required for full features
use_cases: Your analysts need to build complex, interactive dashboards connecting multiple data sources without writing SQL or custom code
You present data to executive stakeholders and need pixel-perfect, highly visual charts that go beyond what Excel or Google Sheets can produce
Your organisation is already on Salesforce and wants native integration for CRM analytics and pipeline reporting in Tableau
You're embedding analytics into a customer-facing product and need Tableau's Embedded Analytics to serve personalised dashboards at scale
